title: Moderation Actions — 2026-04-28
body:
The following actions were taken after reviewing the abuse queue today:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Permanently banned for distributing phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- new_member_17 — Warned for not following community formatting guidelines.
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for repeated near-identical automated-style replies in help channels.

**No action taken (2)**
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Report stemmed from a moderation disagreement; no policy violation found.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — Confirmed false positive; report was the result of coordinated brigading following a legitimate moderation decision.

All 6 reports have been closed. If you have questions about these decisions, please contact the moderation team.
